violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Dining room beverage dispenser was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed food employee washing dishes with gloved hands and then with the same gloves on put oven mitts over them to check items in the oven. Gloves should be changed between tasks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Dining area beverage dispenser was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Observed food employee wash dishes and then place them in the sanitizing solution. Items should be rinsed before placing them in the sanitizing solution.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
